requirement_topic.en: CRC Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (IT&C Law 1341/2009, CRC Resolution 5050/2016)
requirement_topic.zh: CRC强制型式认可——无线电及电信终端设备型号认证（IT&C法1341/2009，CRC决议5050/2016）
requirement_topic.zht: CRC強制型式認可——無線電及電信終端裝置型號認證（IT&C法1341/2009，CRC決議5050/2016）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi routers, Bluetooth devices, IoT hubs, smart speakers, and any device incorporating wireless radio technology — must obtain a mandatory CRC homologación (type approval) certificate issued by the Comisión de Regulación de Comunicaciones (CRC) before import or sale in Colombia. The legal basis is IT&C Law 1341 of 2009 and CRC Resolution 5050 of 2016 (Resolución CRC 5050). The homologación process requires submission of a technical dossier including accredited laboratory test reports for radio (RF), EMC, and electrical safety; a product description and technical specifications; and a signed declaration by the Colombian authorized representative or importer. The CRC may accept test reports from internationally accredited laboratories (e.g., ILAC-accredited), and FCC test data may serve as a useful basis for some parameters, but the CRC homologación certificate is a separate Colombian administrative act and is not replaced by FCC, CE, or SRRC/CCC approvals. The homologación certificate number must be displayed on the Spanish-language product label. MinTIC (Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones) oversees overall ICT policy within which the CRC operates as an independent regulator.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi路由器、蓝牙设备、物联网集线器、智能音箱及任何内置无线技术的设备——在哥伦比亚进口或销售前，须取得由通信监管委员会（CRC）颁发的强制型式认可（homologación）证书。法律依据为2009年IT&C法1341号和2016年CRC决议5050号（Resolución CRC 5050）。型式认可申请须提交技术文件，包括经认可实验室出具的无线电（射频）、EMC和电气安全检测报告、产品描述及技术规格，以及哥伦比亚授权代表或进口商签署的声明。CRC可接受国际认可实验室（如ILAC认可）出具的检测报告，FCC检测数据对部分参数可作为有用基础，但CRC型式认可证书属独立的哥伦比亚行政行为，不能由FCC、CE或SRRC/CCC核准替代。认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。MinTIC（信息与通信技术部）负责整体ICT政策监督，CRC作为独立监管机构在其框架下运作。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi路由器、藍牙裝置、物聯網集線器、智慧音箱及任何內置無線技術的裝置——在哥倫比亞進口或銷售前，須取得由通信監管委員會（CRC）頒發的強制型式認可（homologación）證書。法律依據為2009年IT&C法1341號和2016年CRC決議5050號（Resolución CRC 5050）。型式認可申請須提交技術文件，包括經認可實驗室出具的無線電（射頻）、EMC和電氣安全檢測報告、產品描述及技術規格，以及哥倫比亞授權代表或進口商簽署的聲明。CRC可接受國際認可實驗室（如ILAC認可）出具的檢測報告，FCC檢測數據對部分參數可作為有用基礎，但CRC型式認可證書屬獨立的哥倫比亞行政行為，不能由FCC、CE或SRRC/CCC核准替代。認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。MinTIC（資訊與通信技術部）負責整體ICT政策監督，CRC作為獨立監管機構在其框架下運作。

standards_or_laws: IT&C Law 1341 of 2009 (Ley 1341/2009) — Colombian information technologies and communications framework law; establishes mandatory homologación for radio and telecom terminal equipment
CRC Resolution 5050 of 2016 (Resolución CRC 5050) — CRC regulatory framework for telecom equipment homologación procedures and requirements
CRC (Comisión de Regulación de Comunicaciones) — Colombian independent regulator for telecommunications; issues homologación certificates
MinTIC (Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones) — oversees ICT policy framework within which CRC operates

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must comply with MIIT (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology) type-approval requirements under the Radio Regulations and SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices additionally require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the CNCA system for consumer electronics. MIIT SRRC approval covers radio frequency parameters; CCC covers safety and EMC. China also requires MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for certain telecommunications terminal equipment. GB standards (GB 15629, GB/T 29242, and related Wi-Fi/Bluetooth standards) form the technical basis. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by the CRC and do not substitute for Colombian homologación.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须符合工业和信息化部（MIIT）依据无线电管理条例的型号核准要求，以及国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）无线电型号核准。Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备还须依据CNCA体系取得消费电子产品CCC（中国强制认证）。MIIT SRRC核准涵盖无线电频率参数；CCC涵盖安全和EMC。中国还要求特定电信终端设备取得MIIT进网许可证（NAL）。GB标准（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相关Wi-Fi/蓝牙标准）构成技术基础。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被CRC承认，不能替代哥伦比亚型式认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須符合工業和資訊化部（MIIT）依據無線電管理條例的型號核准要求，以及國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）無線電型號核准。Wi-Fi和藍牙裝置還須依據CNCA體系取得消費電子產品CCC（中國強制認證）。MIIT SRRC核准涵蓋無線電頻率參數；CCC涵蓋安全和EMC。中國還要求特定電信終端設備取得MIIT進網許可證（NAL）。GB標準（GB 15629、GB/T 29242及相關Wi-Fi/藍牙標準）構成技術基礎。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL不被CRC承認，不能替代哥倫比亞型式認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval — mandatory radio frequency parameter certification for wireless devices in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory safety and EMC certification for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — required for certain telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629 series — Chinese radio (Wi-Fi/802.11) technical standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio type approval, CCC, and MIIT NAL are not recognised by the CRC and do not substitute for Colombian homologación. A separate CRC homologación application must be filed with a technical dossier. FCC test reports (for RF parameters) may be accepted as supporting data within the CRC dossier, reducing retesting cost for exporters who have already obtained FCC authorisation — but the CRC certificate is a separate administrative act and is always required. CE certificates are similarly not recognised. The CRC homologación certificate number must appear on the Spanish-language product label. Failure to obtain homologación before import or sale is a regulatory violation subject to penalties and product withdrawal in Colombia.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型号核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被CRC承认，不能替代哥伦比亚型式认可。须单独向CRC提交含技术文件的型式认可申请。FCC检测报告（针对射频参数）在CRC文件中可作为支持数据被接受，有助于降低已取得FCC授权出口商的重测成本——但CRC证书属独立行政行为，须单独申请。CE证书同样不被承认。CRC型式认可证书编号须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。进口或销售前未取得型式认可属违规行为，在哥伦比亚面临处罚和产品下架风险。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型號核准、CCC和MIIT NAL不被CRC承認，不能替代哥倫比亞型式認可。須單獨向CRC提交含技術文件的型式認可申請。FCC檢測報告（針對射頻參數）在CRC文件中可作為支持數據被接受，有助於降低已取得FCC授權出口商的重測成本——但CRC證書屬獨立行政行為，須單獨申請。CE證書同樣不被承認。CRC型式認可證書編號須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。進口或銷售前未取得型式認可屬違規行為，在哥倫比亞面臨處罰和產品下架風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CRC homologación certificate required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Colombia under IT&C Law 1341/2009 and CRC Resolution 5050/2016; no recognition of FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval + CCC required for wireless consumer devices in China; MIIT NAL required for certain telecom terminal equipment

source.publisher: CRC — Comisión de Regulación de Comunicaciones (Colombia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CRC homologación under IT&C Law 1341/2009 and Resolution 5050/2016 is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold in Colombia. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised. FCC test reports may assist as supporting data within the CRC dossier but do not replace the Colombian certificate. The homologación number must appear on the Spanish-language label. Verify current CRC application procedures, accepted laboratory accreditations, and dossier requirements with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据IT&C法1341/2009和决议5050/2016，CRC型式认可对所有在哥伦比亚销售的无线电及电信终端设备为强制性要求。中国SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承认。FCC检测报告可作为CRC文件内的支持数据，但不能替代哥伦比亚证书。型式认可编号须标注于西班牙语标签上。进入市场前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验现行CRC申请程序、认可的实验室资质和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據IT&C法1341/2009和決議5050/2016，CRC型式認可對所有在哥倫比亞銷售的無線電及電信終端裝置為強制性要求。中國SRRC、CCC和MIIT NAL核准不被承認。FCC檢測報告可作為CRC文件內的支持數據，但不能替代哥倫比亞證書。型式認可編號須標注於西班牙語標籤上。進入市場前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗現行CRC申請程序、認可的實驗室資質和文件要求。
